definition: A system that perceives its environment, reasons about it, and takes actions to achieve goals
definitionZh: 一个感知环境、进行推理并采取行动来实现目标的系统

definition: Secret token used to authenticate requests to an AI service
definitionZh: 用于验证对AI服务请求的秘密令牌

definition: Anthropic's family of large language models
definitionZh: Anthropic的大型语言模型系列

definition: Python string formatting with embedded expressions using f"...{var}..."
definitionZh: 使用f"...{var}..."嵌入表达式的Python字符串格式化

definition: A format for describing the structure of JSON data, used for tool input parameters
definitionZh: 描述JSON数据结构的格式，用于工具输入参数

definition: Parameter that limits the maximum length of an AI model's response
definitionZh: 限制AI模型响应最大长度的参数

definition: Claude's primary API for sending and receiving conversational messages
definitionZh: Claude用于发送和接收对话消息的主要API

definition: Python's default package installer for downloading libraries
definitionZh: Python默认的包安装器，用于下载库

definition: Receiving AI response tokens incrementally as they are generated
definitionZh: 在生成时逐步接收AI响应token

definition: Instructions sent to the AI that define its behavior and personality
definitionZh: 发送给AI的指令，定义其行为和个性

definition: Parameter controlling randomness in AI responses (0 = deterministic, 1 = creative)
definitionZh: 控制AI响应随机性的参数（0=确定性，1=创造性）

definition: AI capability to call external functions and use their results in responses
definitionZh: AI调用外部函数并在响应中使用其结果的能力

definition: Isolated Python installation that keeps project dependencies separate
definitionZh: 隔离的Python安装环境，保持项目依赖独立

definition: Field indicating why the model stopped generating (end_turn, tool_use, max_tokens)
definitionZh: 指示模型停止生成原因的字段（end_turn、tool_use、max_tokens）

definition: Library providing building blocks for creating AI agents (e.g., LangChain, CrewAI)
definitionZh: 提供创建AI Agent构建模块的库（如LangChain、CrewAI）

definition: A sequence of LLM calls and tool uses linked together
definitionZh: 一系列LLM调用和工具使用的连接序列

definition: Popular Python framework for building LLM-powered applications
definitionZh: 用于构建LLM驱动应用的流行Python框架

definition: Framework for building stateful multi-agent workflows as graphs
definitionZh: 以图的形式构建有状态多Agent工作流的框架

definition: Framework for orchestrating role-playing AI agents that collaborate
definitionZh: 编排角色扮演协作AI Agent的框架

definition: Reasoning + Acting loop where the agent thinks, acts, observes, and repeats
definitionZh: 推理+行动循环，Agent思考、行动、观察并重复

definition: The core cycle: receive input, reason, take action, observe result, repeat
definitionZh: 核心循环：接收输入、推理、采取行动、观察结果、重复

definition: Retrieval-Augmented Generation — combining search with LLM generation for grounded answers
definitionZh: 检索增强生成——将搜索与LLM生成结合以获得有根据的回答

definition: Dense vector representation of text that captures semantic meaning
definitionZh: 捕获语义含义的文本密集向量表示

definition: Database optimized for storing and searching high-dimensional vectors
definitionZh: 为存储和搜索高维向量优化的数据库

definition: Splitting documents into smaller pieces for embedding and retrieval
definitionZh: 将文档分成小块以进行嵌入和检索

definition: Metric measuring how similar two vectors are (used for semantic search)
definitionZh: 衡量两个向量相似程度的指标（用于语义搜索）

definition: Open-source embedding database for building RAG applications
definitionZh: 用于构建RAG应用的开源嵌入数据库

definition: Finding documents by meaning rather than exact keyword matching
definitionZh: 通过含义而非精确关键词匹配来查找文档

definition: Model Context Protocol — open standard for connecting AI to external tools and data
definitionZh: 模型上下文协议——连接AI与外部工具和数据的开放标准

definition: A service that exposes tools and resources via the MCP protocol
definitionZh: 通过MCP协议暴露工具和资源的服务

definition: An application (like Claude Code) that connects to MCP servers to use their tools
definitionZh: 连接到MCP服务器以使用其工具的应用程序（如Claude Code）

definition: JSON definition describing a tool's name, purpose, and input parameters
definitionZh: 描述工具名称、用途和输入参数的JSON定义

definition: In MCP, a read-only data source that servers can expose to clients
definitionZh: 在MCP中，服务器可以向客户端暴露的只读数据源

definition: The communication layer between MCP client and server (stdio, SSE)
definitionZh: MCP客户端和服务器之间的通信层（stdio、SSE）

definition: Multiple AI agents working together, each with specialized roles
definitionZh: 多个AI Agent协作，每个都有专门的角色

definition: Coordinating the flow of work between multiple agents
definitionZh: 协调多个Agent之间的工作流程

definition: Measuring agent performance: accuracy, cost, latency, quality
definitionZh: 衡量Agent性能：准确性、成本、延迟、质量

definition: Safety constraints that prevent agents from taking harmful actions
definitionZh: 防止Agent采取有害行动的安全约束

definition: Ability to monitor and debug agent behavior through logs and traces
definitionZh: 通过日志和追踪监控和调试Agent行为的能力

definition: Platform for tracing, evaluating, and monitoring LLM applications
definitionZh: 用于追踪、评估和监控LLM应用的平台

definition: Collection of completed projects showcasing your agentic AI skills
definitionZh: 展示你的Agentic AI技能的已完成项目集合

definition: Written articles explaining what you built and what you learned
definitionZh: 解释你构建的内容和学到的知识的文章

definition: Submitting code, docs, or bug reports to public repositories
definitionZh: 向公共仓库提交代码、文档或bug报告
